evals.prompt: I changed backend/src/handlers/pagos.rs and now cargo clippy is failing with 3 warnings. Fix them.
evals.expected_output: Runs cargo clippy for realestate-backend, parses warnings, fixes in priority order (compilation > lint > tests), re-runs clippy until clean

evals.prompt: The TypeScript build in baileys-service is broken — npm run build shows type errors. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: Reads references/typescript-fixes.md, runs eslint --fix first, parses tsc errors in dependency order (imports > types > implementations > usages), fixes and re-verifies

evals.prompt: After my changes cargo test is failing in backend. Two tests in contratos_tests.rs are broken.
evals.expected_output: Runs fmt and clippy first (higher priority), then runs tests, diagnoses the root cause of test failures, fixes implementation (not tests), re-runs until clean
